meta.title: UzunWerk — Software, E-Commerce & AI Solutions

hero.title: We take your digital products to the next level

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: End-to-end software and experience design — one team, consistent quality.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce
ecommerce.desc: Payments, inventory and order management, fast and secure storefront experiences.

web.title: Websites & apps
web.desc: Corporate sites, portals, and performance-focused interfaces on modern React/Next.js stacks.

chatbot.title: Custom chatbot
chatbot.desc: AI assistants connected to your knowledge base, supporting customers around the clock.

about.title: About us
about.lead: UzunWerk is the software team that stays with you from idea to launch.
about.p1: We are a small, experienced team. We simplify complex projects and ship with scalable architecture and clean code.
about.p2: For every client we offer transparent communication, regular demos, and measurable milestones.

ceo.title: Founder & CEO
ceo.subtitle: Combining AI engineering experience with clear business outcomes.
ceo.name: Emre Uzun
ceo.p1: Emre Uzun holds a degree in Management Information Systems from Bandırma Onyedi Eylül University, with a strong foundation in data, processes, and business analytics.
ceo.p2: After graduation, he spent one year in Istanbul as an AI Developer at a software company, building AI-assisted products and strengthening hands-on engineering delivery.
ceo.p3: He is now focused on establishing his own software company under UzunWerk—prioritizing reliable, scalable, and innovative digital solutions for clients.

projects.title: Selected Work We Deliver

contact.title: Let’s work together
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project — we respond instantly.
contact.briefSubtitle: Pick a type and we’ll prepare a mail draft.
contact.emailBodyIntro: Hi, I’d like to get more information about:
contact.emailBodyClosing: If it fits, we can schedule a short call. Thanks!

ai.title: Interactive AI Simulator
ai.subtitle: Move the orb with your mouse. See the assistant's simulated response and motion based on what you type.
ai.welcome: Hi! Write what you want (e-commerce, a website, or a chatbot) and I'll generate a simulated roadmap.
ai.prompt1_value: I want a chatbot for my customers connected to a knowledge base.
ai.prompt2_value: I want an e-commerce setup with payments and order management.
ai.prompt3_value: I want to design a conversion-focused landing page.
ai.placeholder: e.g., how would a chatbot work?
ai.footnote: Responses are for simulation only (no real LLM calls).

responses.chatbot: Sounds good. For a chatbot, I can suggest 3 steps: (1) intent + answer structure, (2) safety filters for responses, (3) continuous improvement using analytics. What is your goal: support or sales?
responses.ecommerce: For e-commerce, let's set a solid baseline: payment integration, inventory/order flow, and performance measurement. Then we can scale with a multi-language UI and an admin panel. Which payment providers are you considering?
responses.web: For a landing/web experience: message hierarchy, fast loading, and a measurable CTA flow. After that, we improve conversion with A/B testing. Who is your audience, and what language?
responses.default: Great! Let me capture your intent quickly: what do you want to build, and what should users do on the site? Share 2-3 sentences and I'll simulate a plan.
